overview.Name: Jefferson Capital, Inc. Common Stock
overview.Description: Jernigan Capital is a real estate investment trust listed on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE: JCAP) that provides debt and equity capital to private developers, owners and operators of storage facilities with a view to eventual freehold ownership of the facilities financed by the Company.
overview.Address: 600 SOUTH HIGHWAY 169, MINNEAPOLIS, MN, UNITED STATES, 55426
